name: telehealth-pos10
description: Synthetic telehealth packet furnished in the patient's home (Place of Service 10, added to the CMS POS code set 2022-01-01). Regression coverage for R-PA-013: before wave 52-46 the bundled POS list omitted 01-10, so a legitimate telehealth packet was FALSELY blocked with 'POS code not on bundled CMS list'. With the complete CMS POS set bundled, POS 10 is valid and R-PA-013 passes. The packet is otherwise a well-formed, complete submission (like happy-path), so the core ruleset mostly passes; this fixture exists to pin the telehealth POS behavior end to end.

Assessment and plan: continue 99214-level telehealth visit, monthly follow-up.
Medical necessity: ongoing management of generalized anxiety disorder.
